    • ViewService

    Class ViewService

    Tracks active ng-view instances and matches them with registered view configs produced during state transitions.

    Index

    Constructors

    constructor

    Properties

    $get

    Methods

    activateViewConfig available createViewConfig deactivateViewConfig onSync registerUIView rootViewContext sync matches normalizeUIViewTarget

    Constructors

    constructor

    • new ViewService(): ViewService

      Creates an empty view registry ready to track active ng-view instances.

      Returns ViewService

    Properties

    $get

    $get: (
        | "$templateFactory"
        | (($templateFactory: TemplateFactoryProvider) => ViewService)
    )[] = ...

    Returns the singleton view service instance.

    Methods

    activateViewConfig

    • activateViewConfig(viewConfig: ViewConfig): void

      Adds a view config to the active registry.

      Parameters

      • viewConfig: ViewConfig

      Returns void

    available

    • available(): ViewConfig[]

      Returns the currently registered view configs.

      Returns ViewConfig[]

    createViewConfig

    • createViewConfig(path: PathNode[], decl: ViewDeclaration): ViewConfig

      Builds a view config for one view declaration along the specified path.

      Parameters

      • path: PathNode[]
      • decl: ViewDeclaration

      Returns ViewConfig

    deactivateViewConfig

    • deactivateViewConfig(viewConfig: ViewConfig): void

      Removes a view config from the active registry.

      Parameters

      • viewConfig: ViewConfig

      Returns void

    • onSync(listener: (tuples: ViewTuple[]) => void): () => void

      Parameters

      • listener: (tuples: ViewTuple[]) => void

      Returns () => void

    registerUIView

    • registerUIView(ngView: ActiveUIView): () => void

      Registers one active ng-view and returns a deregistration function.

      Parameters

      • ngView: ActiveUIView

      Returns () => void

    rootViewContext

    • rootViewContext(context?: StateObject | null): StateObject | null | undefined

      Gets or sets the root view context used for relative ng-view targeting.

      Parameters

      • Optionalcontext: StateObject | null

      Returns StateObject | null | undefined

    sync

    • sync(): void

      Re-matches active ng-view instances against currently registered view configs and notifies both the views and registered listeners of the new assignments.

      Returns void

    Staticmatches

    • matches(
          ngViewsByFqn: Record<string, ActiveUIView>,
          uiView: ActiveUIView,
      ): (viewConfig: ViewConfig) => boolean

      Builds a predicate that determines whether a view config matches a specific active ng-view.

      Parameters

      • ngViewsByFqn: Record<string, ActiveUIView>
      • uiView: ActiveUIView

      Returns (viewConfig: ViewConfig) => boolean

    • normalizeUIViewTarget(context: ViewContext, rawViewName?: string): string

      • context: ViewContext
      • rawViewName: string = "$default"

      Returns string
